subcodes.first_line: O ye lovers of God! The Sun of Truth hath risen from the horizon of divine favor, and the luminous Moon hath shone forth from the dawning-place of loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اللهک ارنلری شمس حقیقت افق عنایتدن طالع و بدر منیر مطلع عاطفتدن ساطع اولدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @obedience to and respect for government authority
